pr.title: Record: Triple Loop + Fused Kernels + Parallel Residuals + N-gram Tilt; val_bpb 1.08014 (5-seed mean)

output.summary: Triple-loop recurrence with earlier activation, fused MLP kernels, parallel residuals, and causal eval-time n-gram tilt improve throughput and calibration.
techniques: Triple-loop recurrence (NUM_LOOPS=3) with earlier enable to add virtual depth
Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels for faster steps
Causal eval-time n-gram tilt that biases logits via prefix-only hints
